sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_bitmap (id UInt32, bitmap_col AggregateFunction(bitmapBuild, UInt32));
INSERT INTO test_bitmap VALUES (1, bitmapBuild([3, 1, 4])), (2, bitmapBuild([2, 5, 6]));
SELECT id, bitmapMin(bitmap_col) AS min_value FROM test_bitmap GROUP BY id;
UPDATE test_bitmap SET bitmap_col = bitmapBuild([7, 8, 9]) WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, bitmapMin(bitmap_col) AS min_value FROM test_bitmap WHERE id = 2;
